subcodes.first_line: O friends! This prisoner, with radiant countenance and with heart and soul aflame, burneth night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران اين مسجون شب و روز با رخی افروخته و جان و دلی سوخته
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @effort; striving, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
